topic: Neptune Serverless Instance Type Features and Configuration

  entities:

    Neptune Serverless|Service
    Amazon Neptune|Service
    Neptune Capacity Units|Product

  proposition: [The `serverless` instance type refers to the Neptune Serverless feature.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|INSTANCE_TYPE|serverless

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|INSTANCE_TYPE|serverless

  proposition: [Neptune Serverless is a feature of Amazon Neptune.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|FEATURE_OF|Amazon Neptune

    entity-attributes:

  proposition: [Neptune Serverless can scale instance size dynamically based on a workload's resource needs.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|CAPABILITY|dynamic instance size scaling

  proposition: [Neptune Serverless lets users set lower and upper limits on compute capacity for the instances in a DB cluster.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|CAPABILITY|configurable lower and upper compute capacity limits

  proposition: [Compute capacity in Neptune Serverless is measured in Neptune Capacity Units.]

    entity-entity relationships:
    Neptune Serverless|MEASURED_BY|Neptune Capacity Units

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|CAPACITY_UNIT|Neptune Capacity Units

  proposition: [Neptune Serverless eliminates the need to calculate how many vCPUs are needed for an application.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|CAPABILITY|eliminates manual vCPU calculation

  proposition: [Workloads with varying utilization can be cost-optimized by using serverless rather than provisioned instances.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|BENEFIT|cost optimization for varying utilization workloads

  proposition: [Both provisioned and serverless instances can be set up in the same DB cluster.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|COMPATIBILITY|can coexist with provisioned instances in same DB cluster

  proposition: [Setting up both provisioned and serverless instances in the same DB cluster can achieve an optimal cost-performance configuration.]

    entity-entity relationships:

    entity-attributes:
    Neptune Serverless|BENEFIT|optimal cost-performance configuration when combined with provisioned instances
